title: VTech Toot-Toot Drivers Learn & Go Train Set, Track Set with Motorised Vehicle, 19 Play Pieces with 4 Layouts, Interactive Toddler Toy For Ages 12 Months, 2, 3, 4+ Years, English Version
features: MOTORISED TRAIN: Place the train on the tracks and watch it choo-choo around on its own!
EXPLORE: Visit 9 destinations: train station, tunnel, bridge, farm, forest & railway crossing for interactive fun.
LIGHTS, SOUNDS & MUSIC: Press the light-up face button for phrases, songs, and melodies to engage little learners.
INTERACTIVE SMARTPOINT LOCATIONS: Train reacts with fun phrases, sound effects & music as it passes SmartPoint spots.
TRACK SET: Includes 19 track pieces that can be reconfigured into 4 different layouts for endless fun!
description: From the manufacturer Toot-Toot Drivers Learn & Go Train Set Motorised Train Hi. I'm a curious little train, see me run on the Toot-Toot Drivers Learn & Go Train Set by VTech. Place the motorised train on the colourful tracks and watch it choo-choo around! 6 Destination Zones & 3 Learning Modes Travel to 6 destination zones; train station, tunnel, bridge, farm, forest & railway crossing that interact as the train passes and introduces first words, train-themed phrases, simple sound effects & music depending on which of the train’s 3 learning modes is activated. 6 SmartPoint locations trigger actions or reactions as the train passes them. 4 Fun Configurations! Motorised train & wagon feature light up face button triggering phrases, songs & melodies. Set includes 19 track pieces inter-changeable to 4 fun configurations. Developmental Benefits Language Development Sensory Development Motor Skills Imaginative Play Suitable for ages 1-5 years Requires 2 x AAA batteries, not included

specifications_table.Included Components: 19 tracks pieces including 6 destination zones,, Barrel accessory, Motorised train with 2 wagons,
